entity.summary: Decentralized options and perpetual futures exchange launched in April 2023 on the Aevo Rollup. Aevo later became the unified brand for the former Ribbon Finance ecosystem, with Ribbon governance and the RBN token migrated into Aevo and AEVO governance.
entity.notes: Month-level launch marker. HEI treats Aevo as the active successor and unified exchange brand; Ribbon's structured-products lineage is retained as an alias/context rather than a separate Aevo exchange entity.

events.title: Aevo launched as an onchain derivatives exchange
events.description: Aevo launched in April 2023 as a central-limit-order-book decentralized exchange for options and perpetual futures, settling trades through smart contracts on its custom Ethereum rollup.
events.notes: Official governance material establishes April 2023; the exact launch day is not asserted.

events.title: Ribbon governance and RBN migrated into the Aevo brand
events.description: Following approval of the Ribbon-to-Aevo merger and rebrand, Aevo became the unified brand for the exchange, structured products, governance, and rollup. The AEVO token launched in mid-March 2024 with a migration path from RBN.
events.notes: Stored at month precision because the official governance timeline describes a mid-March token-generation and migration phase.

evidence.title: Aevonomics introduction
evidence.notes: Official governance retrospective stating that Aevo launched in April 2023.

evidence.title: What is Aevo?
evidence.notes: Official help material describing Aevo as an active decentralized derivatives exchange.

evidence.title: RGP-33: Merge Ribbon Finance into Aevo
evidence.notes: Primary proposal defining the unified Aevo brand, Ribbon integration, and 1:1 RBN-to-AEVO migration.

evidence.title: AGP-1.5 TGE update
evidence.notes: Primary governance timeline placing the AEVO token generation and RBN migration in mid-March 2024.
